Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 5, ['Location-based risk modeling adjustment for pricing', 'Integration of professional liability coverage under the same umbrella policy', 'Freelancer-specific compliance verification for German professionals', 'Eco-friendly replacement feature for damaged equipment', 'Bundle discount applied across multiple plans']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 15, ['Health insurance plan options with costs and coverage tiers (basic, standard, premium)', 'Mental health coverage details including crisis intervention and family therapy', 'Property insurance covering photography equipment and home office gear', 'Travel insurance including adventure sports coverage', 'Monthly and annual total cost for each plan', 'Deductible levels and processing times', 'Wellness programs and gym reimbursement features', 'Telemedicine inclusion', 'Luxury items coverage and concierge services', 'Global coverage and 24/7 emergency support', 'Multilingual or international network size and language support', 'Coverage type distinctions (health_physical, health_mental, property, travel)', 'Currency specified in EUR', 'Geographic coverage for Germany and Berlin region', 'Proposal presentation of multiple insurance plan options']
